overall.description: A first-person night walk through a forest logging trail illuminated by flashlight. The camera moves steadily forward along a dirt path lined with stacks of cut logs, with dense forest visible in the background. In the final moments, a hand holding a wooden pole enters the frame from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest logging trail with timber stacks on left

large stack of cut timber logs piled horizontally along the left side of the path
tall grass and undergrowth lining the edges of the trail
dense dark forest silhouette against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking along a dark forest trail at night. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing a dirt trail with grass on both sides and large stacks of cut logs piled on the left. The dense forest forms a dark backdrop against the clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: logging corridor with timber stacks on both sides

events.description: hand holding a wooden pole enters the frame from the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through a corridor formed by log piles on both sides, now holding a wooden pole in the left hand

entered.detail: stack of cut logs appearing on the right side, creating a corridor effect
long wooden pole or staff being held in the left hand, entering the frame

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows into a corridor flanked by log piles on both sides. The camera continues walking forward through this logging area, and near the end of the segment, a hand holding a wooden pole enters from the left. The surrounding forest remains dark with only the path illuminated by the flashlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark forest trail that gradually narrows into a corridor of timber. It begins by walking down a dirt path illuminated by a flashlight, with grass lining the edges and large stacks of cut logs piled to the left against a backdrop of dense trees and a clear night sky. As the camera advances, the open trail shifts into a tighter passage flanked by log piles on both sides, restricting the field of view to the immediate path. The scene then continues forward through this logging area before a hand holding a wooden pole enters the frame from the left.
